title: AUDIENCE-ASK — Eva picks up the glowing magic bottle
prompt: Tight close-up shot on @beach-shore — the wet sand at the gentle calm tide line, soft ripples lapping in slowly. @eva-beach already kneeling on the wet sand with both knees softly resting on the sand and both hands cupping a small glowing aqua-blue glass bottle she has gently lifted out of the wet sand. Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow falling softly forward. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both holding the bottle gently together. The @magic-bottle has a tiny cork stopper and emits a soft faint magical sparkle, the rolled paper note visible inside through the aqua-blue glass. Tiny twinkly sparkles drift upward from the bottle softly. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Eva turns the bottle slowly in her cupped hands, eyes huge with wonder. Eva (small wonder-whisper): "...what IS this?" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva slowly turns her head DIRECTLY toward the camera with bright wonder-sparkle eyes, the bottle still cupped softly in her hands. She holds the bottle up gently toward the camera with both hands. Eva (warm friend-to-friend tone, eyes lit up): "Did YOU see what I just found?!" She holds her warm look at the camera waiting cheerfully for the kid watching at home to answer. STRICT ANATOMY: Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both holding the bottle together. Eva stays kneeling with both knees softly on the wet sand throughout — no jumping, no leaping, no running off. Calm cheerful kid-show ocean ambiance throughout. The wet sand stays plain wet sand — no marks, no red, no debris, no trash.
